description: Layout section, ships populated: full-height hero with content anchored bottom-left (editorial composition) over an Unsplash demo image + bottom gradient scrim in the background slot (swap for a local asset).

--- /** * Hero-02.astro -- layout section: full-height hero, content anchored * bottom-left (editorial/photography composition). Ships populated * (frontend-contract.md §7): renders a complete block; make * it yours by editing this copy you own. * * `background` slot: absolute layer behind the content -- this * composition carries its full-bleed image there. Ships with an Unsplash * demo image + bottom gradient scrim as the slot fallback; swap the img * src for a local asset, or fill the slot: * * * * */ import { cn } from "../../../lib/utils"; import Button from "../Button.astro"; interface Props { class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---

Est. 2026

Built low and to the left.

The editorial composition: a full-bleed image in the background slot, the story anchored at the baseline.
